title: astripomoea hyoscyamoides var. melandrioides
intro: Astripomoea hyoscyamoides var. melandrioides, also known as a plant species within the Convolvulaceae family. It is an herbaceous perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains hyoscyamine and scopolamine, alkaloids with sedative, antispasmodic, and anticholinergic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. Astripomoea hyoscyamoides var. melandrioides can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried extract, and has been used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate pain.
